news.t: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs
GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs.

GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs: COYY, TSYY, NVYY, XBTY, AMYY, TQQY, AZYY, YSPY, MTYY, PLYY, HOYY, SMYY, BBYY, FBYY, IOYY, MAAY, NUGY, SEMY, QBY, RGYY, HMYY, RTYY, MUYY, TMYY, CWY, CRY and 20+ Others

holdings.infoBox: IOYY is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings. The top holdings are United States Treasury Bills 3.545% stock at 54.27%, Us Dollars at 49.00%, Put Ionl June 30.01 06/18/2026 at 3.08%, Put Ionl June 28.75 06/17/2026 at 1.15%, and Put Ionl June 35.91 06/15/2026 at 1.13%.

overview.description: The GraniteShares YieldBOOST IONQ ETF (IOYY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is actively managed seeking current income and the daily 2x leverage of the price performance of IonQ, Inc. (NYSE: IONQ) IOYY was launched on Nov 4, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.
